_doc: Single source of truth for all PJL pricing. EVERY pricing-aware file in this codebase reads from here. Do not hardcode prices anywhere else. Quote line items snapshot prices at creation time (lead.features captures price as-of-creation). Seasonal tier structure (residential 1-4/5-6/7-8/9-15/16+ and commercial 1-4/5-8/9+) was reconciled 2026-05-02 to match the live interactive calculators on sprinkler-spring-opening.html and sprinkler-fall-winterization.html — those calculators are the canonical customer-facing tier truth. Spring and fall use the same tier prices.

head_replacement.label: Sprinkler head replacement (any size, any type)

wire_diagnostic.label: Wire diagnostics & simple repair (in valve box)

wire_run_100ft.label: Wire run replacement — up to 100 ft

wire_run_175ft.label: Wire run replacement — up to 175 ft

wire_run_per_ft.label: Wire run — per ft beyond 175 ft

pipe_break_3ft.label: Pipe break repair (up to 3 ft of 1" pipe)

new_install_t1_base.label: New install Tier 1 (1-4 zones) base fee

new_install_t2_base.label: New install Tier 2 (5-7 zones) base fee

new_zone_install.label: New zone install (starts at $575 — custom quote)

extra_pots_drip.label: Add-on: flower pot & planter drip zone

extra_remote_hose_bib.label: Add-on: remote hose bib install (with trenching)

rules.spring_fall_no_service_call: Spring opening / fall closing pricing is all-in. Service call ($95) is NOT charged on top.
rules.service_call_scope: $95 service call covers mobilization + quick on-site assessment ONLY. It does NOT include any labour. All diagnostic and repair labour is billed separately at $95/hr. Repair quotes are issued with an assumed amount of time for the diagnosed work; if actual time runs over the estimate, additional labour is billed at $95/hr and quoted to the customer before continuing.
rules.ai_intake_correct_diagnosis_bonus: PJL's ONLY discount: if the AI repair tool correctly diagnoses the repair (i.e., the on-site fix matches what the AI predicted), the customer receives ONE HOUR of repair labour FREE on the diagnosed work. If the AI's diagnosis is wrong, no free hour applies. Anything else found on-site beyond the diagnosed repair is billed at parts + $95/hr, quoted before any extra work.
rules.whole_manifold_rule: When ANY valve in a box fails, PJL replaces the ENTIRE manifold AND ALL valves in that box together. Never single-valve repair. Quote formula = manifold tier ($135 for 1-3 valves OR $285 for 4-6 valves) + ($74.95 × valve count) + $95 service call.
rules.backflow_not_offered: PJL does NOT service backflow assemblies. Refer customer to a certified backflow tester.
rules.head_default_assumption: Default head: 4" Pro Spray for grass, 6" for beds. Single $68 flat covers any size/type.
rules.controller_brand: Only one controller installed: Hunter HPC-400 (Hydrawise WiFi). Tiered by zone count via PCM modules.
rules.seasonal_tier_source_of_truth: Seasonal tier structure (residential 1-4/5-6/7-8/9-15/16+ and commercial 1-4/5-8/9+) is canonical. Spring and fall use the SAME tier prices. The interactive zone calculators on sprinkler-spring-opening.html and sprinkler-fall-winterization.html are the tier reference; pricing.json mirrors them.

seasonal_tiers._doc: Reference table for the seasonal tier structure. Spring and fall use the same prices. 16+ residential and 9+ commercial are custom quotes (price 0). UI surfaces should display this structure or a simplified subset.

manifold_examples._doc: Pre-computed PARTS + TRIP totals for the Whole Manifold Rule (service_call + manifold tier + valve_hunter_pgv × N), derived from primitives above. UPDATED 2026-05-04: under the new service-call policy, these totals are NOT all-in. Repair labour is billed separately at $95/hr (typically 1–2 hours for a manifold rebuild). The AI-correct-diagnosis bonus credits the customer ONE HOUR of repair labour free if the on-site diagnosis matches the AI-quoted scope. AI must always quote (a) parts+trip total from this list, (b) the $95/hr labour rate + estimated 1–2 hours, (c) the bonus framing.

water_calculator._doc: Domain assumptions for water-cost-calculator.html. Mirrors PJL_Irrigation_Cost_Model.xlsx (Inputs sheet). DEFLATED 2026-04-30: manual_cycles_per_season was 84 (every-other-day, full season) — too aggressive vs how homeowners actually water under typical GTA bylaws. Reset to 60 (3 days/week × ~20 weeks). Bylaw-defensible in a sceptical homeowner conversation. The headline_scenario annual_savings_cad is the customer-facing 'Save up to $X/year' figure on the homepage callout, the floating savings widget, and the sprinkler-hydrawise.html callout — keep all three in sync if you change inputs here. Do NOT 'fix' the savings figure back to a higher number without re-running the calculator math; the lower number is the deliberate post-deflate canonical. If an audit/sweep proposes a different number, defer to this entry.
water_calculator._history: Previously $800 (84 manual cycles, every-other-day baseline). Reduced to $580 on 2026-04-30 after deflating the manual baseline to 60 cycles (3 days/week per typical GTA watering bylaw). Audit AI reverted to $800 once before this entry was added; do not let it happen again.
water_calculator.manual_cycles_rationale: 3 days/week per typical GTA watering bylaw × ~20 weeks of in-season demand. Older spec used 84 (every-other-day, full season) which wasn't bylaw-defensible.
water_calculator.plant_loss_probability_rationale: 15% chance of meaningful drought damage in a manual-timer year (no smart skipping). Drives the Landscape Protection Value panel.

landscape_value_by_size._doc: Replaceable landscape value at risk in a drought stretch — sod + mature trees + perennial beds. Drives 'Landscape Protection Value' panel when annual water savings are too low to motivate on their own.

headline_scenario._doc: Scenario powering the customer-facing 'Save up to $X/year' headline on index.html (callout + floating widget) and sprinkler-hydrawise.html. Annual savings = manual_cost − smart_cost for THIS scenario specifically. If manual_cycles_per_season, smart_skip_rate, GPM/runtime tiers, or municipal water rates change, recompute and update annual_savings_cad below AND the three customer-facing surfaces (index.html lines ~1656 + ~2038, sprinkler-hydrawise.html callout).

source_files: water-cost-calculator.html (MANUAL_CYCLES const + pjl:pricing-loaded subscriber drive the live calc)
callout_locations: index.html — homepage hero callout under Quote Estimator teaser
